// TCP three-way handshake establishes a connection before data transfer.
//
// 1. Client -> Server: SYN          (client requests a connection)
// 2. Server -> Client: SYN-ACK      (server acknowledges and requests back)
// 3. Client -> Server: ACK          (client acknowledges; connection open)
//
// TCP is connection-oriented and reliable: it guarantees ordered, error-checked
// delivery of a byte stream. Connections are torn down with a FIN exchange.
